name: Guardsmen (GEQ)
description: Guard-equivalent infantry: the baseline light-infantry chaff target.

name: Intercessors (MEQ)
description: Marine-equivalent infantry: the canonical T4 2-wound 3+ save benchmark.

name: Terminators (TEQ)
description: Terminator-equivalent infantry: 2+ save with a 4++ invuln and 3 wounds.

name: Invader ATV (light vehicle)
description: Light fast-attack vehicle: the low-wound vehicle benchmark.

name: Predator (battle tank)
description: Generic tracked battle tank: the mid-toughness armour benchmark.

name: Rhino (transport)
description: Dedicated transport: the T9 10-wound transport benchmark.

name: Armiger (light knight)
description: Light walker / knight-armiger: the T9 14-wound 5++ benchmark.

name: Questoris Knight
description: Questoris-class super-heavy walker: the T11 26-wound 5++ benchmark.

name: Cerastus Knight Lancer
description: Cerastus-class knight: the T11 28-wound 4++ heavy-armour benchmark.

name: Rogal Dorn Battle Tank
description: Heavy Guard battle tank: the T12 2+ save 18-wound benchmark.

name: C'tan Shard (monster)
description: Monster with an ability-granted invuln and (often) damage reduction: the resilient-monster benchmark.
